name: Rana 60.75" Floor Lamp - FLL4129 - Black/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Rana Iron Floor Lamp, a stunning blend of black and gold tones. Standing at 60.75 inches, this lamp becomes a striking element in any room. Crafted from sturdy metal, it offers both elegance and durability. The sleek design and color palette infuse a modern touch that enhances your decor effortlessly. Perfect for living rooms or studios, the Rana lamp creates a warm and inviting atmosphere, making it an ideal choice for both casual and formal settings. Brighten up your home with this beautiful piece that combines style and functionality seamlessly.
